description: Overtime paid at 1.5x after 8 hours/day or 40 hours/week. Double time on statutory holidays.
Minimum 72 hours notice required for shift changes. Emergency exceptions require union steward approval.
Night shift workers receive $2.50/hr premium. Weekend shifts receive $3.00/hr premium.
When multiple qualified workers available, senior employee has right of first refusal for preferred assignments.
Two 15-min paid breaks and one 30-min unpaid lunch per 8-hour shift.
Workers have right to refuse unsafe work per Quebec LSST.
Employer must accommodate physical limitations per Quebec Human Rights Charter.
Non-union engineering staff have flexible start times (7:00-9:00) with core hours 9:00-15:00.
Contractors with Full flexibility can be reassigned with notice period per contract. Day-only contractors cannot be assigned night shifts.
Contractor overtime subject to individual contract terms. Some contracts prohibit OT entirely.
